name: Employer says my emphysema pre-existed, fighting claim?

mainEntity.name: Employer says my emphysema pre-existed, fighting claim?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Prove aggravation or acceleration via pulmonologist.**

Comp pays for work-worsened conditions[8]. Baseline tests compare.

- Progression evidence.
- Exposure history.
- No full causation needed.

Expert opinion counters; common win[8].
